markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Review AI-generated blog images to align with Bubble's brand.](https://fathom.video/share/vzQUAdXAy_Vnu6emW3SgedWb71aHDwES?tab=summary&timestamp=21.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Refine Brand Tone:** Shift from a "playful" feel (e.g., storybook rockets) to a "serious, trustworthy" one, reflecting Bubble's brand evolution.](https://fathom.video/share/vzQUAdXAy_Vnu6emW3SgedWb71aHDwES?tab=summary&timestamp=116.0)
  - [**Adopt Key Visuals:** Incorporate "glass" textures and a secondary color palette to add visual interest and avoid a monotonous "sea of blue and purple."](https://fathom.video/share/vzQUAdXAy_Vnu6emW3SgedWb71aHDwES?tab=summary&timestamp=387.0)
  - [**Improve Technical Quality:** Increase image saturation and contrast to prevent a "washed out" look and ensure visual impact.](https://fathom.video/share/vzQUAdXAy_Vnu6emW3SgedWb71aHDwES?tab=summary&timestamp=519.0)
  - [**Streamline Workflow:** Use Slack for communication and provide multiple image options per draft for faster, more collaborative reviews.](https://fathom.video/share/vzQUAdXAy_Vnu6emW3SgedWb71aHDwES?tab=summary&timestamp=585.0)

## Topics

### Brand Alignment & Tone

  - [**Problem:** Initial AI images felt "playful" and "weird," misaligning with Bubble's brand goal of being perceived as "powerful" and "trustworthy."](https://fathom.video/share/vzQUAdXAy_Vnu6emW3SgedWb71aHDwES?tab=summary&timestamp=106.0)
  - [**Guidelines:**](https://fathom.video/share/vzQUAdXAy_Vnu6emW3SgedWb71aHDwES?tab=summary&timestamp=116.0)
      - [**Avoid:** Storybook illustrations (e.g., rockets), text overlays (due to cropping issues on the blog), and overused AI tropes (e.g., magic wands).](https://fathom.video/share/vzQUAdXAy_Vnu6emW3SgedWb71aHDwES?tab=summary&timestamp=116.0)
      - [**Embrace:** "Glass" textures (translucent white) and a secondary color palette to add visual interest beyond the primary blue/purple.](https://fathom.video/share/vzQUAdXAy_Vnu6emW3SgedWb71aHDwES?tab=summary&timestamp=387.0)
  - [**Process:** GrowthX will provide multiple image options per draft for review. Bubble will stage content in the CMS to vary publication dates and avoid a sudden, jarring change in blog aesthetics.](https://fathom.video/share/vzQUAdXAy_Vnu6emW3SgedWb71aHDwES?tab=summary&timestamp=585.0)

### Technical & Aesthetic Feedback

  - [**Problem:** Some images were "washed out" with poor contrast, lacking visual impact.](https://fathom.video/share/vzQUAdXAy_Vnu6emW3SgedWb71aHDwES?tab=summary&timestamp=519.0)
  - [**Solution:** Increase saturation and contrast in the AI generation pipeline to create more visually interesting, non-monochromatic images.](https://fathom.video/share/vzQUAdXAy_Vnu6emW3SgedWb71aHDwES?tab=summary&timestamp=519.0)
  - [**Tooling:** The current pipeline uses GPT for image generation, which may limit creative control. A new Figma brand guidelines page is in development and will be shared with GrowthX to inform future designs.](https://fathom.video/share/vzQUAdXAy_Vnu6emW3SgedWb71aHDwES?tab=summary&timestamp=364.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Katia (GrowthX):**](https://fathom.video/share/vzQUAdXAy_Vnu6emW3SgedWb71aHDwES?tab=summary&timestamp=490.0)
      - [Update AI pipelines with new prompts to reflect brand feedback (serious tone, glass textures, secondary palette, higher contrast).](https://fathom.video/share/vzQUAdXAy_Vnu6emW3SgedWb71aHDwES?tab=summary&timestamp=490.0)
      - [Share new examples via Slack for review.](https://fathom.video/share/vzQUAdXAy_Vnu6emW3SgedWb71aHDwES?tab=summary&timestamp=726.0)
  - [**Aida (GrowthX):**](https://fathom.video/share/vzQUAdXAy_Vnu6emW3SgedWb71aHDwES?tab=summary&timestamp=776.0)
      - [Ask Alice to add Eve to the content team's Slack channel.](https://fathom.video/share/vzQUAdXAy_Vnu6emW3SgedWb71aHDwES?tab=summary&timestamp=776.0)
  - [**Eve (Bubble):**](https://fathom.video/share/vzQUAdXAy_Vnu6emW3SgedWb71aHDwES?tab=summary&timestamp=409.0)
      - [Share the new Figma brand guidelines page with GrowthX once available.](https://fathom.video/share/vzQUAdXAy_Vnu6emW3SgedWb71aHDwES?tab=summary&timestamp=409.0)
